creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213723
assign-py-django-bootstrap-form-to-django22.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that assigns www/py-django-bootstrap-form to Django 2.2 because Django 1.11 is End-of-Life since April 2020.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Pet portlint by order variables according the PHB.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
